name: Stealth Game Starter
description: Top-down stealth game with vision cones. Player with crouch (reduced visibility) and sneak mechanics (slower movement). Enemy guards with triangular vision cones (Area2D), patrol routes (Path2D), alert states (patrol/suspicious/alert/search). Noise system: running generates radius, throwable objects distract. Line of sight via RayCast2D. Security cameras with rotating vision. Hide spots (lockers, bushes). Alarm triggers reinforcements. Light/shadow affects visibility.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project config with PhysicsWorld2D for RayCast visibility

scenes/.level.tscn: Root Node2D with TileMap (walls, floor, light sources), Player, Guards array, Cameras array, HideSpots array, Alarms, Doors, UI CanvasLayer, Light2D ambient light
scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D (2-direction or top-down), CollisionShape2D, StealthComponent, InputHandler, NoiseEmitter
scenes/.guard.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D, VisionCone (Area2D triangle), PatrolRoute (Path2D), AlertState machine, RayCast2D for line of sight
scenes/.security_camera.tscn: Node2D with Sprite2D (camera icon), RayCast2D cast (ray-based vision), RotationController, VisionCone polygon (draws on _draw())
scenes/.hide_spot.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (locker/bush), CollisionShape2D, hide_interaction trigger
scenes/.distraction_object.tscn: RigidBody2D or Area2D projectile spawned on player throw, generates noise_radius on landing
scenes/.alarm_trigger.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (alarm box), activates on player detection, spawns reinforcement guards
scenes/.ui/detection_meter.tscn: CanvasLayer ProgressBar showing detection level (0-100%), color green→yellow→red as threat increases
scenes/.ui/noise_indicator.tscn: CanvasLayer circular indicator showing noise radius around player, shrinks when idle

scripts/.player_stealth.gd: Inherits CharacterBody2D. Properties: is_crouching (bool), is_sneaking (bool), movement_speed (150 default, 75 crouch, 50 sneak), visibility_radius (normal 100, crouch 50, sneak 30). Methods: handle_input() (Shift crouch toggle, Alt sneak toggle, E interact with hide spots, Space throw distraction). _physics_process() applies velocity and collision. Emits noise based on movement speed. Signals: player_detected, player_hidden
scripts/.guard_ai.gd: Inherits CharacterBody2D. Properties: state (patrol/suspicious/alert/search), patrol_path (Path2D), vision_cone (Area2D), current_target_pos. Methods: _physics_process() implements state machine. In patrol: moves along Path2D. On vision_entered(player_area), checks line_of_sight and visibility (player visibility_radius vs distance). If visible, → alert. On suspicious: moves toward last_seen_pos. On alert: attacks or calls for help (activates alarm). On search: checks adjacent areas for player. Signals: guard_alerted, guard_attacking, guard_idle
scripts/.vision_cone.gd: Inherits Area2D (parent: guard). Creates triangular polygon using Polygon2D child. Properties: cone_angle (120°), cone_length (200px). Uses _draw() to render triangle. On area_entered, checks if player, calls parent.guard_ai.check_visible()
scripts/.noise_system.gd: Tracks noise_radius (0-200px based on player speed). On player movement at normal speed, radius = 100px. At walk, radius = 50px. At sneak, radius = 10px. Stationary → radius shrinks 20px/sec. Guards have hearing_distance (150px). If within hearing_distance and noise_radius > 0, guard becomes suspicious
scripts/.alert_manager.gd: Singleton managing global alert state (0-3: calm/suspicious/alert/lockdown). Methods: raise_alert(level) increases state, lower_alert() decreases over 20 seconds if no new detections. On lockdown (level 3): all guards search, reinforcements spawn, doors lock. Signals: alert_level_changed
scripts/.camera_rotation.gd: Attached to security_camera. Rotates camera 360° continuously or oscillates. On player in vision_cone_range, sweeps at increased speed. Emits light/shadow effect using RayCast2D
scripts/.hide_system.gd: Manages hide spots. Methods: start_hide(hide_spot_node) hides player (invisible, no noise, no detection). On player exits (E again), reveals player. If guard enters hide_spot during hide, player is found. Visual feedback: blur effect while hidden
scripts/.patrol_route.gd: Attached to guard or camera. Stores Path2D with waypoints. Methods: get_next_waypoint() returns next point along path, loops at end

assets/.tilesets/stealth_level.tres: TileSet with floor, walls, doors (locked/unlocked), vents, windows, obstacles
assets/.sprites/player.png: 32x32 top-down player sprite with idle + running animation frames
assets/.sprites/guard.png: 32x32 guard sprite with idle, patrol, alert (red) animation states
assets/.sprites/hides/: Locker, bush, crate sprites for hide spots
assets/.sprites/ui/: Detection meter icons, noise indicator circle, alert level icons

preBuiltMechanics: Player movement with crouch and sneak modes (varying speeds and visibility radii)
Crouch reduces visibility radius from 100px to 50px
Sneak mode reduces visibility radius to 30px and speed to 50
Guard vision cone (Area2D triangle, 120° angle, 200px range) with RayCast2D line of sight validation
Guard patrol routes using Path2D waypoints
Alert state machine: patrol → suspicious → alert → search
Noise system: movement speed generates radius, heard by guards within hearing_distance
Throwable distraction objects that create noise radius on landing
Line of sight checking via RayCast2D between guard and player
Hide spots (lockers, bushes, crates) that conceal player when interacted
Security cameras with rotating vision and detection
Light/shadow visibility: player less visible in shadows, more visible in light
Global alert level system affecting guard behavior
Alarm triggers that spawn reinforcement guards and lock doors
customizationPoints: Add stealth takedown mechanic (melee attack from behind while undetected)
Implement disguise system (guard outfit allows infiltration, removes detection)
Create environmental interactions: lights to turn off, cameras to disable, vents for crawling
Add guard patrol randomization with probability of deviating from route
Implement radio communication between guards (one alert calls nearby guards)
Create objective system: steal item, plant device, escort NPC, hack terminal
Add thermal vision goggles (reveals heat signatures through walls)
Implement social stealth (blending in crowds, following marked routes)
Create elaborate security systems: keycard doors, motion sensors, pressure plates
Add permadeath hardcore mode with global guard learning (harder on replays)
examplePrompts: Add a stealth takedown mechanic: if player approaches guard from behind while undetected, E triggers silent knockout
Create a disguise system where wearing guard clothes allows free movement but loses if close to guards for too long
Implement light switches that player can interact with to turn off lights and reduce visibility
Add communication between guards: if one is alerted, nearby guards are notified via radio chatter
Create cameras you can disable by cutting power or hacking control panel
Implement objectives: steal the diamond from vault, plant listening device on CEO, escort scientist to exit
Add thermal vision goggles that reveal guards through walls but drain battery
Create ventilation system accessible from certain areas allowing alternate routes
Implement keypads and doors requiring specific access levels found on enemy bodies
Add a reputation system where loud gameplay alerts harder difficulty on replays
